x-enumeration-literals.name: Network Operation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Handle the scheduled operation of the ATM network, load-balancing communication devices and detecting outages/errors

x-enumeration-literals.name: Device Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description: Track the status of ATM devices, tracking available cash and non-cash inventory to support distribution planning

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Distribution
x-enumeration-literals.description: Handle the physical cash inventory deposited and available for withdrawal at the ATMs

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Document Handling
x-enumeration-literals.description: Handle the generation and capture of documentation associated with financial transactions executed at the ATM

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Transaction Capture
x-enumeration-literals.description: Handle the routing of financial transactions initiated through the ATM channel/device
